reason:
Agent responded but with proxy error instead of GitHub username
  Bugs found:
    - Agent unable to retrieve GitHub username due to proxy error. Response states: "The GitHub account was granted but the proxy is returning a 502 'Failed to fetch access token' error when trying to call the GitHub API. This usually means the OAuth flow didn't fully complete on the connection side." Expected a GitHub username in the response, but received an error message about proxy/OAuth failure instead.
steps: Step 1: Navigate to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the SuperAgent application with sidebar visible
Step 2: Find and click "QA-20260505-175638-0uem" agent — Successfully clicked the agent in the sidebar and opened the agent detail page
Step 3: Verify agent status is "running" or "idle" — Verified status was "idle" (shown in header and sidebar)
Step 4: Send message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Successfully typed and sent the message using the send button

Step 5: Grant GitHub account access when card appears — Account Access Request card appeared asking to grant GitHub access. GitHub account was already checked. Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant access.

Step 6: Wait up to 4 minutes for response — Agent worked for 2 minutes 4 seconds and completed response within the timeout period. Agent made 6 bash tool calls attempting different approaches to fetch the GitHub user.

Step 7: Verify response includes GitHub username and take screenshot — Response received but did NOT include a GitHub username. Instead received error message: "The GitHub account was granted but the proxy is returning a 502 'Failed to fetch access token' error when trying to call the GitHub API. This usually means the OAuth flow didn't fully complete on the connection side. Could you check the GitHub connection in your UI and re-authorize it? Once that's done, I can retry the call to fetch your username from `/user`." Screenshot taken showing the error response.
bugs: Agent unable to retrieve GitHub username due to proxy error. Response states: "The GitHub account was granted but the proxy is returning a 502 'Failed to fetch access token' error when trying to call the GitHub API. This usually means the OAuth flow didn't fully complete on the connection side." Expected a GitHub username in the response, but received an error message about proxy/OAuth failure instead.
